   "reasoning": "I desperately need funding support and scholarships. I have seen how teacher incentives can make a difference, but I also know it won't save my school now. I'll keep the attendance mandate low because it only increases stress. Transparency reports might be useful for adults, but I just want my school to focus on keeping me in class. More staff will help, but it's not a guarantee. Counseling programs are a lifeline for me and my friends.",
